HR POLICY DOCUMENT
1. Introduction
This document outlines the Human Resources (HR) policies of the organization. It provides
guidelines for employees regarding workplace conduct, benefits, and responsibilities.
2. Working Hours
Standard working hours are 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM, Monday to Friday. Employees are expected to
adhere to these timings unless otherwise approved.
3. Leave Policy
Employees are entitled to:
- 12 Casual Leaves per year
- 10 Sick Leaves per year
- 15 Paid Leaves per year
4. Code

Leaves per year
- 15 Paid Leaves per year
4. Code of Conduct
Employees must maintain professionalism, respect colleagues, and avoid any form of harassment
or discrimination.
5. Remote Work Policy
Employees may work remotely with prior approval from their manager. Performance and availability
must be maintained.
6. Compensation and Benefits
Salary is credited on the last working day of each month. Benefits include health insurance and
performance bonuses.
7. Termination Policy
Either party may t

bonuses.
7. Termination Policy
Either party may terminate employment with a 30-day notice period.
8. Data Security
Employees must ensure confidentiality of company data and comply with security protocols.
9. Grievance Handling
Employees can report concerns to HR. All complaints will be handled confidentially.
10. Conclusion
These policies are subject to change based on company requirements.
